# High-level design

## Vision
A test fixture HLD with content under every required section.

## Goals
- Exercise the validator.

## Non-goals
- Be a real project.

## Users / consumers
The validator test suite.

## Success criteria
All validator tests pass.

## System type
Library.

## Architecture style
Modular monolith.

## Tech stack
TypeScript and Bun.

## Quality attributes
Reliability first.

## Key constraints
None of substance.

## Open questions
None.

## ADR index
None.
